item.name: Squirrel Emperor
item.description:
At once more powerful and adorable than a certain simian king.

Use item to acquire the squirrel emperor minion.
item.tooltip:
Thanks to predation by other rodents,
only the fittest and most vicious of
squirrels survive to adulthood.
   - Hunter-scholar
item.specialactiondescription:
Sets a trap that, when triggered, delivers an attack with a potency of 180 to all enemies within range.
Activation Delay: 10s
